benchmark: LiveLingo Real-Time Voice Translation Benchmark 2026 — Section 2 Comprehension Fidelity

methodology.audio: 30 English source utterances. 16 kHz mono WAV. Download audio.zip at the same path.
methodology.rubric: 0-5 comprehension fidelity. Penalize: wrong word substitution, missing entities/numbers, punctuation that changes sentence type, language-script mixing. Do not penalize: stylistic register or valid synonyms.
methodology.composite_score: Arithmetic mean of the three independent judge scores per cell.
